features: HG All Plastic Cleaner: Universal cleaning solution for the home. Cleans walls & windows, window sills & steps, doors & wallpaper, washable paint & cladding – safe for synthetic surfaces
Removes dirt & grease without the risk of dulling: Gentle on surfaces, tough on mucky marks & deposits. Leaves UPVC window frames & kitchen or bathroom cupboards shiny, streak-free & mould free
Restores shine: Ready-to-use biodegradable spray intensively cleans all around the house & outside. Ideal for cleaning patio furniture & chairs, tables or PVC weatherboards & conservatory frames
Revives plastic surfaces: Restores shine whilst cleansing plastic & other synthetic materials. Easy to use & fast acting, suitable for homes with children & pets – non toxic
500ml spray: Spray the cleaner on a clean cloth & use it to clean the plastic surface or spray directly onto the material to be cleaned. Leave it to work & wipe off
description: Product Description HG All Plastic Cleaner is an effective and multi-use intensive plastic cleaner suitable for a multitude of synthetic surfaces in and around the home. The clever formula cleans and restores the shine to all types of dirty synthetic materials and plastics, such as UPVC window frames, doors and windowsills, cladding, steps, plastic weather boards, plexiglass, conservatory steps, polycarbonate, cladding such as Trespa®, kitchen cupboards, bathroom cabinets, washable wallpaper, paint and other similar surfaces. The biodegradable plastic cleaner is specially formulated for all types of plastic and is great for use indoors on plastic ornaments and accessories through to swings, slides and patio furniture outdoors. The universal plastic cleaner cleans intensively without the risk of dulling. Our plastic cleaner works quickly and safely to ensure that dirt and grease are removed easily from plastic, leaving it clean and shining like new! Our plastic cleaner is a ready-to-use biodegradable and non toxic spray. Discover HG’s wide range of specialist cleaning products for your home, office and outside space. Includes: 1 x HG All Plastic Cleaner (500ml spray bottle) How to use HG All Plastic Cleaner: 1. Spray the cleaner on a clean cloth and use it to clean the plastic, plexiglass or polycarbonate surface - or spray the liquid directly onto the material to be cleaned. 2. Preferably leave it to work and then wipe it off. Keep this product out of sight and reach of children. Always read the label and product information before use. Ingredients Non-Ionic and Anionic Surfactants <5%, Preservation Agents: 2-Bromo-2-Nitro- Propane-1,3-Diol Box Contains 1 x HG Intensive Plastic Cleaner 500ml Manufacturer Contact Information Made by: HG International b.v., P.J. Oudweg 41, 1314 CJ Almere, The Netherlands. See more
